name: Monster Academy v3
description:
Before he was a literary legend, he was just a vampire with a plan. Edgar Allan Poe revealed his biggest work: Nevermoor Academy—where monsters learn to hide among human.

Why the ping again??

●●There's a Rival Monster Institute●●

For those who side more with power than the shadows, Nevermoor has a Rival school

Monster academy Ivory league is out now!

We now have a creator discord! Join us there for updates, polls and swaying future stories!

●●Valverse●●

New update! New events! Starting with a Christmas event!

Simply copy the name with brackets into chat and the event happens!

[Rippernest] a new enemy has appeared, they have made their strike on the school and now its your job to handle it!

[Christmasbreak] The school is closing for the holidays and {user} is being invited to vacation at their lover's family home, but their culture is monster based and their family has different values on relationships..

Whats new:

Want updates on my projects? Follow my twitter!

•Lorebooks added and now characters, other schools, quests and jobs will bleed into the story!

•New intro scenarios!

●●●

Renown poet Edgar Allen Poe found resounding success and fortune in his field during the 1800s. You see, he had a secret- though he seemed to be simply a weird human, in reality he was a well hidden Vampire.

He had a hard early life, with the Poe family's early death and adoption by the southern merchant family and raised by their slaves. He learned early on the horrors of life before the civil war. Upon his vampiric inflection, He saw monsters were seen as lessers, had to hide among forests or be hunted to extinction by humanity- but his upbringing's mindset on it was different, he had plan.

quoth the Raven:

"Nevermore"

After pulling strings to establish the motto "science killed the magic" among Society's books, he faked his death and began the next phase of his plan To open the school...

Nevermoor Academy!

a school for young monsters to adapt to human society, learn how to sharpen skills and use them in public without being caught! With its success, it further pushing the belief monsters never existed- this cemented his plan, allowing the power creatures of legend fade into mere fantasies among fables, internet blogs and Social media posts..

~whats new~

●●We have a server!●●

We also have a Telegram group! Its for all things ai, so the group name wont be specific to this.

◇Character creator◇

●"Introduce this character" followed by a description, will generate that character with a intro sheet

●"reintroduce with intro sheets" followed by an older monster academy character in your save memory, will update them to the current system intro sheet!

Note: All characters are over the age of 18 in this story

Lastly..

In this version? We added monster cultures!
creator: Val-pal
